human_analysis_records.summary: OAuth2TokenEndpointFilter.doFilterInternal() parses HTTP request, delegates to AuthenticationManager.authenticate(), and writes response. No Cipher, MessageDigest, or MAC call in filter body. Crypto is in upstream JwtGenerator provider.
raw_observations: No Cipher/MessageDigest import in filter class
human_analysis_records.notes_for_planner: Token endpoint filter confirmed as delegation layer — not a crypto class.

reasoning_trace.finding: Authentication delegated — no crypto in filter
Filter is HTTP routing infrastructure — crypto in upstream provider
No operative crypto in token endpoint filter

human_analysis_records.summary: OAuth2TokenIntrospectionEndpointFilter.doFilterInternal() delegates to AuthenticationManager for token introspection. No direct Cipher/MessageDigest in filter body. JWT signature verification is in the authentication provider.
human_analysis_records.notes_for_planner: No action needed. Introspection filter is a delegation layer.

reasoning_trace.finding: Authentication manager handles token introspection — no crypto in filter
JWT verification is in provider, not this filter
No operative crypto in introspection filter

human_analysis_records.summary: TokenSettings.withDefaults() sets SignatureAlgorithm.RS256 as default JWT signing algorithm. RS256 = RSA PKCS#1 v1.5 + SHA-256. This constant flows into JwtGenerator via JwsHeader. Closes FU-001.

labels.security_concern_note: RS256 uses PKCS1v15 padding; PS256 (RSA-PSS) preferred per NIST SP 800-131A

uncertainties: Application may override with ES256/PS256 via custom TokenSettings bean
follow_up_suggestions: Verify no custom TokenSettings bean overrides RS256 in application SecurityConfig.
human_analysis_records.notes_for_planner: RS256 confirmed. Closes FU-001 from HAR-002. PQC: RS256 is quantum-vulnerable.

reasoning_trace.finding: RS256 = RSA PKCS1v15 with SHA-256 digest
RSA relies on integer factoring — broken by Shor's algorithm
RS256 default confirmed from TokenSettings source

follow_up_requests.reason: JwtGenerator algorithm is configuration-driven via TokenSettings.signingAlgorithm(). Default value in withDefaults() must be confirmed to assign algorithm_name RS256/ES256.
PasswordEncoder algorithm not confirmed in RegisteredClient. Must inspect InMemoryRegisteredClientRepository and application SecurityConfig PasswordEncoder bean wiring.
follow_up_requests.planner_decision: DelegatingPasswordEncoder confirmed in ClientSecretAuthenticationProvider:77. BCrypt default. CLOSED 2026-06-12.

follow_up_requests.reason: Binary keystore.p12 key algorithm and size not readable from text. Must inspect via keytool or cross-reference with X509CertificateGeneratorApplication to confirm RSA-2048.
follow_up_requests.planner_decision: RSA-2048 inferred from X509CertificateGeneratorApplication cross-reference. Direct keytool inspection still recommended. PARTIAL 2026-06-12.

follow_up_requests.reason: nimbus-jose-jwt exact version managed by Spring Security BOM — not pinned in root build.gradle. Version required for PQC readiness assessment.
spring-security-crypto version BOM-managed — must resolve to confirm available PasswordEncoder implementations (BCrypt, Argon2, SCrypt).
follow_up_requests.planner_decision: spring-security-bom 7.0.0-M2 in libs.versions.toml:3. BCrypt confirmed. CLOSED 2026-06-12.

follow_up_requests.reason: Authorization code generator implementation not visible in OAuth2AuthorizationCodeRequestAuthenticationProvider. Must inspect concrete OAuth2AuthorizationCodeGenerator or equivalent for entropy source confirmation.

planner_feedback.description: nimbus-jose-jwt and spring-security-crypto versions are BOM-managed. Agent 2 should resolve BOM and pin exact versions in dependency evidence records for all future passes.
JwtGenerator algorithm flows from TokenSettings.withDefaults() — callee not included in CB-002. Agent 2 should always expand configuration_driven tasks to include callee withDefaults() method body.

PasswordEncoder algorithm not confirmable from RegisteredClient or ClientSecretAuthenticationProvider alone. Agent 2 should auto-include the SecurityConfig bean definition in PasswordEncoder-related context bundles.

Build plugin classes (SpringSigningPlugin, SpringRepositoryPlugin) and CI workflow YAML files contain lexical crypto signals but are structurally identifiable as build-toolchain scope. Add path-based exclusion rules: buildSrc/ and .github/workflows/ → auto-classify as not_crypto.
Binary keystore.p12 requires out-of-band inspection (keytool) — Agent 2 should note binary artifact limitation and auto-generate a keytool command in known_limitations for all .p12/.jks files.
Authorization code generator callee not included in CB-018. Agent 2 should expand wrapper_usage tasks to include one level of callee implementation in context bundle.

Generic interface declarations (OAuth2TokenGenerator, OAuth2TokenCustomizer) match *Token* grep patterns but contain no operative crypto. Agent 2 should check file type (interface-only, @FunctionalInterface) and downgrade to not_crypto candidates automatically.
